name: EuiTitle
description: Styled heading element. Use the size prop to control scale; use as to set the HTML heading level.
visualDescription: Styled heading text — larger and heavier font weight than body copy. No background, no border, no container. Comes in scale sizes: xxxs → xxl, corresponding to h1–h6 visual weight. NOT EuiText (which wraps body copy). NOT EuiStat (which is always paired with a metric descriptor label). The HTML element rendered (h1–h6) is set by the `as` prop and may differ from the visual size.

children.description: ReactElement to render as this component's content
